title: Shadows Over Bellifrey
description: Before your Time, Before the world lost it's name, they called it, Bellifrey.
body:
### Before your time, before the world lost it's name, they called it, Bellifrey.
![Title Card!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7a13d5e085292d3a03ba4c8093855969f64cd9d.png)
Shadows Over Bellifrey is a Vanilla+ Modpack inspired by the CurseForge Modpack "Raspberry Flavoured", Whilst taking it's Own liberties. Designed Heavily with World Building in Mind.

if you have not tried out Raspberry Flavoured yet, we HIGHLY ENCOURAGE you to give it a try on CurseForge, as it is a Hidden Gem that deserves all the love it can get <3
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured)
# Main Features this modpack includes:
- Three New Playable Characters in the form of the Bellump, Ambrail, and Gelmire!
- Overhauled World Generation for the Overworld and the Nether, splitting the Casual / Adventure style of gameplay between the two worlds.
- the additon of the Aether! aimed towards giving the Player Bosses, Whilst removing the stagnation of an Endgame.
- The Removal of Key features like Villagers, the End Dimention, and a handful of Other Overpowered features.
- New Wildlife to make the world feel more alive and deadly!
- Built in World Sharing with up to 8 Friends.
- Fully Optimized with Shader Support.
- New Mechanics such as Improved Agruculture and Cooking, a Dieting system, comabtive healing, New Tiers of Tools, Dark Magic, Automations, Growable Ores and So, SO MUCH More!
- and Killer Bunnies! Do not, Pet, the Bunnies...

### Note:
All mods, resource packs, and shaders included in this modpack are the property of their respective creators, except where otherwise noted as the property of CandleBug Studios. We do not claim ownership over any third-party content. Full credit is given to the original authors for their contributions. Inclusion in this modpack is made with respect for the creativity of the community, and all content remains under the rights and licenses defined by its original creators.
